design_concept: Minimalist modern approach with a 'Godly' agency feel. The design relies heavily on a stark white canvas, generous whitespace (negative space), confident and large typography, and a distinctive deep cobalt blue as the sole accent color to create a premium, fast, and high-end aesthetic. No AI slop patterns.

typography.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-tight text-[#0F172A]
typography.label: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-[#0047FF]

motion_interactions.scroll_reveal: framer-motion initial opacity-0 y-10 to opacity-100 y-0

navigation.style: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-100 transition-all

hero.layout: Asymmetric split layout or massive left-aligned typography. Avoid generic centered designs. The tagline 'Next generation content' must be prominent.
hero.cta: bg-[#0047FF] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-semibold inline-flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-[#0036CC]

services_bento.layout: Tetris-style bento grid (col-span-8, col-span-4 mixes) to avoid boring identical squares.
services_bento.card_style: bg-[#F8FAFC] border border-[#E2E8F0] p-10 flex flex-col justify-between group overflow-hidden relative

portfolio.layout: Grid masonry or strict 2-column large grid. Use Shadcn Tabs to filter 'Photo' and 'Video'.
portfolio.image_style: w-full h-[500px] object-cover filter grayscale hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-700 cursor-pointer

contact.layout: Massive typography for CTA, single prominent WhatsApp button, minimal social links.
contact.form: NONE. The prompt explicitly restricts forms. Use WhatsApp direct link.

images.description: Black and white image of a Nikon camera lens being held
Detailed black and white macro shot of a camera lens with 28mm marking
Elegant flat lay of cosmetic products with crystals
Elegant portrait of a woman in a metallic jacket
Stylish woman in fur coat and sunglasses
Studio portrait of a confident young man in a blue suit
Close-up portrait of a serious woman in a black blazer

instructions_to_main_agent: COPYWRITING: The entire site MUST be in Bahasa Indonesia. Tagline 'Next generation content' can remain English. Brand name is 'Kontengrafi'.
NO AI MENTIONS: Do not explicitly mention 'AI' or 'Kecerdasan Buatan'. Focus entirely on 'modern, fast, next-generation studio'.
COLOR THEME: Strictly use the Blue & White palette provided. No purple gradients, no dark mode, no generic blue. Stick to #0047FF and White/Slate.
SECTIONS REQUIRED: Hero, About (Cerita Kami), Services (Layanan - UGC, Foto Komersial, Video Komersial), Portfolio (Karya Kami - Photo/Video tabs), Testimonials, Contact (Hubungi Kami).
COMPONENTS: Use pure HTML+Tailwind for complex overlapping grids (Hero, Services). Use Shadcn UI for Tabs (Portfolio) and Carousel (Testimonials).
CONTACT SECTION: Do not build a contact form. Only include a massive WhatsApp CTA button and social media links (Instagram, TikTok).
TESTING: Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, nav links, tabs).
ICONS: Use lucide-react for UI icons (arrow-right, play, camera, etc).
